failedAssertions.reason: fetchBucket in api.ts uses wrong URL path: calls /${chain}/bucket?token= instead of /${chain}/check_bucket?token=. Returns 404, triggers fallback instead of real metadata. Fix: change '/bucket?' to '/check_bucket?' on line 90 of frontend/src/lib/api.ts.

Because fetchBucket uses wrong URL, metadata fetch fails. Token is saved to localStorage with truncated address as symbol ('0x6399c8') instead of real symbol ('PREMIA'). Same root cause as VAL-UNK-002.
End-to-end flow partially works (modal triggers, save works, price fetches) but modal does not show real metadata (PREMIA/Premia/18) due to wrong URL bug. Same root cause as VAL-UNK-002.

appliedUpdates.description: Noted that Docker frontend container may not have latest code (was built before metadata feature commit). Tests should use Vite dev server at localhost:5173 for frontend-only features.

rootCauseIssue.description: fetchBucket uses wrong endpoint path '/bucket?' instead of '/check_bucket?'
